The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Detestable Sepulcher

Klaxons mimic panicked breaths.
Defenses target living signs.
Floors creak under unseen weights.
Madness prices true star sights.
Walls confess damned.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • Mach niemals Versprechungen, die du nicht einhalten kannst.
  • I came From 2 down
  • mlem
  • SESWSESEESWWSWSSSENNEESSEENNWNNESEEEESSUNNWNENWWWWWNENNEEENWWWNEEEESUNWSWSSESWWWWSSEEU
  • North isn't a loop, it actually leads to the exit
  • if you give a monkey a gun he will be free
  • DOWN and EAST
  • North seems to lead in a loop back to here (or I just pressed the wrong button)
  • South dead end
  • (4) Деканат
